case_title: DOUGLAS LEE VS. BRENT TAHAJIAN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT BRENT TAHAJIAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND STIPULATION FOR CONDITIONAL ENTRY OF FUTURE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND ANY FACTS THAT WOULD JUSTIFY SETTING ASIDE THE SETTLEMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS LEE'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MINI MINUTES: no appearance by both parties. matter submitted.

Notice And Motion To Set Aside Settlement Agreement And Stipulation For Conditional Entry Of Future Judgment.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER.
